message:
feat(indexer): lexical generation manifest vocabulary (ibuuh.30 slice)

Lands the foundation type vocabulary for crash-safe atomic publish
semantics (bead ibuuh.30). This slice is intentionally isolated from
the rebuild pipeline — downstream slices will wire it into scratch
builds, validation, and promotion.

New module `src/indexer/lexical_generation.rs`:
- `LexicalGenerationBuildState` (Scratch | Building | Built | Validating
  | Validated | Failed) serializes as snake_case.
- `LexicalGenerationPublishState` (Staged | Published | Superseded |
  Quarantined) serializes as snake_case. Independent of build state so
  the lifecycle "validated but not yet published", "published but
  superseded", etc. is representable.
- `LexicalGenerationFailure { attempt_id, at_ms, phase, message }`
  for the append-only failure log.
- `LexicalGenerationManifest`: manifest_version, generation_id,
  attempt_id, created_at_ms, updated_at_ms, source_db_fingerprint,
  conversation_count, message_count, indexed_doc_count,
  equivalence_manifest_fingerprint (optional link back to the ibuuh.29
  streaming accumulator digest), build_state, publish_state,
  failure_history.
- `new_scratch`, `transition_build`, `transition_publish`,
  `record_failure`, `is_serveable` helpers.
- `store_manifest` uses tmp-file + rename so readers never observe a
  partial write; `load_manifest` returns `Ok(None)` for missing files
  and refuses future `manifest_version` values with a clear error.

Seven unit tests (all passing):
- JSON round-trip with all fields populated.
- Snake_case serialization of every build and publish state variant.
- Append-only failure history bumps `updated_at_ms`.
- Disk round-trip through `store_manifest` / `load_manifest` with a
  missing-file probe.
- Future-version rejection during load.
- Atomic rename leaves no tmp files behind and overwrites an existing
  manifest cleanly.
- `is_serveable` requires both Validated and Published simultaneously.

Dead-code allowed module-wide because nothing wires these types into
the rebuild pipeline yet; that is the next slice of ibuuh.30.

No rusqlite introduced (AGENTS.md Rule 2); module is pure serde +
std::fs atomic rename and never touches SQLite.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
